creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
The lang/lua port had the version 5.0.x prior to the update to 5.1 on 2006-05-03 13:25:42 UTC. You may checkout (via svn) a revision of  lang/lua prior to this date, but it is not likely to work without modification.

The latest version of lua 5.0.x was released 2006-06-19, and thus is it very unlikely that a port will be created for that version branch.

You also have the option of compiling it locally using the sources available at: http://www.lua.org/ftp/
